Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the long-term momentum rankings. LINC (rank #1, score 92.5) shows extraordinary 10-year returns of 2,084%, with consistent acceleration across all timeframes and all four moving averages in bullish alignment; notably, it has outperformed SPY by 116% over 1 year and by 1,834% over 10 years. AGX ranks second with even more extreme absolute returns—2,011% over 10 years and 1,366% over 5 years—though it carries a slightly lower score due to fewer ratio passes (3 vs. 4 for LINC) and slightly less consistent momentum progression. Both securities display "clean" momentum signals with normal volatility profiles and all SMAs intact, suggesting their gains reflect genuine long-term secular trends rather than short-term speculation. The data indicates these are genuine outliers in the 700+ ticker universe being tracked, though the incomplete data for AGX (missing bad_spy_score and other fields) prevents a complete comparative analysis.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
